title: Create: Isaac's Creative Additions
description: (Create ICA) Create inspired ramen mod. WHICH DOES ADD SODA (WE'RE SO BACK)
body:
# **THE SODA UPDATE IS OUT!!!**
![An image of a cat with an explosion behind it. Text on the image says "Life update: We are so back."](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6848b7a25462af605cd65627b5f3ac1a567f830b.jpeg)
## WHAT DID WE ADD?
1. **SODA!!!!**
    - Coki Cola
    - Pepis
    - Dr Peppa
    - Spritz

2. **Lots of fluids 😭😭**
_OooommL Ts actually took like half the update time (of one week)_
    - CO2 _(Technically a gas, but yk)_
    - Caramel
    - Carbonated Water
    - Simple Syrup~~~~
    - Coki Cola Syrup
    - Pepis Syrup
    - Dr Peppa Syrup
    - Spritz Syrup
    - Lemon Juice
    - Cherry Extract
    - (Prolly like a lot more so check the changelog ✌️)

3. **ITTTEEEEMMMSSS**
_Ohhhh WAITER, more retextured code please!_
    - Cherries
    - Lemons
    - Calcium Carbonate _(I WILL be adding more uses for this)_
    - Empty/Filled Canister
    - Sweet Mash
    - Spice Blend
    - Vanilla Bean _(Green Bean What-chu Mean)_

4. **Ehh yada yada system upgrades**
_If you really wanna know abt this, read the changelog_

5. **THE TEXTURE OVERHAUL IS REAL**

<details>
<summary>Big ahh image</summary>

![Chopper from one piece crying yelling "The Texture Overhaul Is Real!!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca5e8ba5357601c9f4ee371dc3844c98fdefe13e.jpeg)

</details>

> I FINALLY got my paid assistant, Liam _(Liam check your DANG BALANCE please otherwise why do I pay you, thank you)_ to lock in and MAKE GOOD TEXTURES!!

**THE REST OF THE DESCRIPTION**

Do you like Ramen? Do you like Create? Do you like SODAAAAA!!!!!!?

THEN THIS IS THE MOD FOR YOU!

This mod focuses on making food for the create mod! While I may not be the best at making mods, I know that my foods will make progressing through your create mod world, just that bit harder! (Because who wants fun food when you can make a 5 layer pork farm in the nether)


<details>
<summary>OG Description for those who want to read it.</summary>

Hey guys!

This mod adds some ramen themed stuff that works with the create mod!

As this mod was just released things are incredibly unbalanced, so expect things to change.

------------------------------------

For now the mod adds:

- 3 broths (Basic, Soy and Miso)

- A new plant (Soybean Plant)
  
- A few new items
  - Soft Boiled Egg
  - Ramen Bowl
  - Salt
  - Dough Sheet
  - Cooked and Uncooked Ramen Noodles
  - Pork Bones
  - Pork Slices
  - Fermented and Regular Soybeans
  - Miso Paste
  
- And 4 ramen bowls
  - Basic Ramen Bowl
  - Soy Sauce Ramen Bowl
  - Miso Ramen Bowl
  - DELUXE Ramen Bowl

------------------------------------

BIG kudos to my friend Liam for the textures. (You don't him so just say "Thanks Liam.")

Also expect an remaster soon (new items AND a texture overhaul 👀)

(and) Sorry for the GENERATIONALLY long update time 😭😭✌️

</details>
